source.temporal: apps/project-tracker/docs/metrics/sprint-18/_summary.json (GENERATED, GITIGNORED cache per ADR-067 Phase 2 — NOT committed, NOT reproducible in a clean checkout; used as SUPPORTING-ONLY, never as committed evidence). Committed timing evidence: .specify/sprints/sprint-18/attestations/*/task-tracking.json.

category_legend.C01_DELIVERED_ATTESTED_CLEAN: Completed + canonical attestation.json verdict COMPLETE + 4/4 validations pass + all KPIs met
category_legend.C02_DELIVERED_ATTESTED_KPI_GAP: Completed + attestation present but >=1 KPI unmet or verdict PARTIAL (honest partial — e.g. real-DB bench not run in CI)
category_legend.C03_DELIVERED_PR_EVIDENCED_NO_ATTEST: Completed, NO canonical attestation, but shipped via title-hit feature PR + artifacts on disk (governance evidence gap)
category_legend.C04_DELIVERED_STALE_BACKLOG: CSV still Backlog but shipped via title-hit feature PR merged to origin/main (status lag)
category_legend.C05_DELIVERED_ARTIFACT_ONLY: Completed, NO attestation, NO feature-PR trail, but primary deliverable exists on disk (route-group-agnostic). Governance + CSV-artifact-path integrity gap
category_legend.C06_PHANTOM_COMPLETED: Completed, NO attestation, primary deliverable ABSENT on disk — genuine phantom
category_legend.C08_NOT_DELIVERED_BACKLOG: Backlog, no implementing PR/commit, artifacts absent — genuine deferral
category_legend.C09_PARTIALLY_DELIVERED: Some DoD limbs shipped, at least one required limb missing/unverified
category_legend.C10_STATUS_UNVERIFIABLE: Does not cleanly resolve — needs human

completion_timestamp_evidence_committed.note: Committed-verifiable from .specify/.../task-tracking.json (67 tasks; 62 have the file, 5 do not: IFC-032, IFC-078, PG-063, PG-132, PG-188).
completion_timestamp_evidence_committed.correction: Prior value 28 with 'x16/x8 bulk-sync clusters' derived from the GITIGNORED generated _summary.json cache and is NOT reproducible from committed sources. Committed evidence shows NO cluster larger than x2. The honest committed defect is timing ABSENCE (34 null + 5 missing files), not synthetic duplication.

tasks.description: Redis-backed AI Monitoring State Bridge - Replace process-local singleton reads with shared Redis telemetry store

tasks.description: Company-to-Account Navigation Link - Lead detail page shows company name as plain <span> in profile card (line 1352) and info panel (line 1656). Replace with Next.js Link component navigating to /accounts/[accountId]. Requires accountId in lead transform/query. Apply same pattern to Contact and Deal detail pages.

tasks.description: Unify Lead Create/Edit Form - Create page (leads/(list)/new/page.tsx, 1029 lines) and Edit page (leads/[id]/edit/page.tsx, 464 lines) share no components. Issues: different API clients (trpc vs api), different field sets (BANT only in create but silently dropped), different styling, different validation, no auth guard on create. Fix: extract shared LeadForm component, unify API client, include all fields in both views, consistent styling.
tasks.dod: Shared LeadForm component used by both create and edit; consistent field set (BANT fields not silently dropped); unified API client; consistent styling; auth guard on create; tests >=90%

tasks.description: Settings Pages Wiring - 4 settings pages with hardcoded data and inert buttons. Team: hardcoded 4-person array, inert Invite/Remove/Role buttons. Integrations: hardcoded provider list, inert Connect/Disconnect buttons. Notifications: hardcoded const, no useState, no onClick on toggles. Account: profile name/email has no save mutation, 3 security buttons (Change Password, Enable 2FA, Download Data) have no onClick. Wire all to real tRPC mutations and queries.

Integrate with existing audit infrastructure at apps/api/src/security/audit/.

tasks.description: Lead Create Form Fixes - BANT Drop, Revenue Mapping, Validation. Fix 3 HIGH issues: (1) BANT fields (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) collected in create form but silently dropped on submit - never sent to API [F3]. (2) annualRevenue mapped to estimatedValue - semantic mismatch between company annual revenue and deal estimated value [F4]. (3) Edit form uses 'as any' cast with no client-side Zod validation - no inline field errors [F9]. Fix: Send BANT to API (add to createLeadSchema if needed), map annualRevenue correctly, add Zod resolver to edit form, remove as any.
tasks.dod: BANT fields persisted on create; annualRevenue and estimatedValue are distinct fields; edit form uses zodResolver with inline errors; no 'as any' casts; sourceOther sent to API; tests >=90%

tasks.description: Account List Page Type Safety & Filter Enums. (1) serverStats cast to any loses type safety (L-01, AccountsPageClient.tsx:154). (2) Double unsafe cast for withOpportunities stat (L-02, AccountsPageClient.tsx:206-208). (3) AccountTier type and getAccountTier() duplicated locally in AccountCard.tsx instead of using domain enum (L-04). (4) Contact status filter uses hardcoded inline option values instead of ContactStatus domain enum (F-09, AccountContactsList.tsx:81-83). (5) Opportunity stage filter uses hardcoded inline strings instead of OpportunityStage domain enum (F-12, AccountOpportunitiesList.tsx:109-114). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4-5, 15.

tasks.description: Deal Detail Action Buttons — Wire 14 No-Ops. (1) EntityHeader 6 no-ops all with onClick: () => {} (F-08): Won → moveStage CLOSED_WON with success dialog; Lost → moveStage CLOSED_LOST with LossReasonModal (reuse from list page); Edit → navigate to edit form or open inline edit; Clone → duplicate mutation; Archive → set archived status; Delete → AlertDialog confirmation + delete mutation. (2) Stakeholder/Product/File 8 no-ops (F-09): Edit stakeholders → open edit dialog; Account icons → navigate to /accounts/[id] and website; Contact icons → mailto: and tel: links; Add Product → product association dialog; File upload → upload mutation; File links → presigned URL download. Depends on IFC-278 (real data needed for mutations). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2.
tasks.dod: Won/Lost buttons trigger moveStage mutations with confirmation; Edit navigates to edit; Clone/Archive/Delete functional with confirmations; stakeholder/product/file buttons all wired; tests >=90%

tasks.description: Deal Router Correctness Fixes. (1) Name updates silently dropped — service has TODO 'Add updateName method' (B-04, OpportunityService.ts:313). Add updateName to domain and wire in service. (2) data.probability?.value unwrapping may be undefined if percentageSchema returns plain number (B-05, router:460). Verify and fix. (3) opportunityListResponseSchema key 'data' vs router key 'opportunities' mismatch (B-07, validators:88 vs router:437). (4) throwOpportunityCreateError maps VALIDATION_ERROR to NOT_FOUND — wrong HTTP semantic (B-09, router:55). (5) validateStageDeactivation throws plain Error → 500 instead of BAD_REQUEST (B-10, validators:214). (6) mapOpportunityToResponse drops closedAt field (B-11, mappers.ts:88-108). (7) CLOSED_LOST no-reason passes Zod but fails at service (B-12, router:322). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 6.
tasks.dod: Name updates persisted; probability correctly unwrapped; schema key matches router; VALIDATION_ERROR → BAD_REQUEST; validateStageDeactivation throws TRPCError; closedAt included in response; CLOSED_LOST reason properly validated; tests >=90%

tasks.description: Deal Filter Wiring & Type Safety. (1) DealFilters state (filters) captured in page but NEVER passed to trpc.opportunity.list.useQuery — ownerId and dateRange selections have no effect on kanban view data (F-10, deals/(list)/page.tsx:214,226). (2) 'More Filters' button has no onClick handler (F-11, DealFilters.tsx). (3) Owner filter only has 2 hardcoded options: 'All Deals' and 'My Deals' — no dynamic user list (F-12). (4) transformDeals uses loose Record<string,unknown> casting at API boundary instead of typed response (F-19, types.ts:102-119). Wire filters to API query params; add server-side owner filter with user list; type-safe API response handling. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 3, 8.
tasks.dod: DealFilters ownerId/dateRange passed to API query; More Filters opens filter panel; owner dropdown shows team members from API; transformDeals properly typed; tests >=90%

tasks.description: Server-side terms acceptance — persist immutable TermsAcceptance audit record (tenantId, userId, termsVersion, acceptedAt, ipAddress, userAgent, route) via tRPC legal.acceptTerms mutation and legal.getAcceptance query; wire Confirm UI on /terms for authenticated users only; replaces client-only localStorage tracker removed from PG-051 as a misleading legal-compliance signal.

tasks.description: Duplicate-detection runtime for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up) — new DuplicateDetectionService (or per-entity services sharing a rule-evaluator) that reads {Contact,Account}DuplicateRule rows at create/update time and either flags or auto-merges/auto-links records; consumes autoMergeOnExactEmail + autoLinkContactsByDomain + notifyOnDuplicate + aiDuplicateDetection + aiIndustryInference + aiEnrichment toggles from the respective AutomationSetting table; transactional merge combines rows (activities, notes, opportunities, tags, aiInsight) with conflict resolution.
tasks.dod: Rule evaluator runs {Contact,Account}DuplicateRule checks at create+update time; contacts respect autoMergeOnExactEmail/notifyOnDuplicate/aiDuplicateDetection; accounts respect autoLinkContactsByDomain/notifyOnDuplicate; auto-merge/auto-link operations are transactional and preserve the oldest record's id while folding in newer relations; new contact_duplicate and account_duplicate notification types added to NOTIFICATION_TYPES; aiDuplicateDetection uses pgvector similarity on the entity's embeddings; >=90% scoped coverage; all 4 validations pass

tasks.description: Reassign endpoints + notifyOnOwnerChange wiring for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up) — add contact.reassign/contact.bulkReassign and account.reassign/account.bulkReassign tRPC procedures; on owner change, invoke the notifyContactReassignment or notifyAccountReassignment helper (both already shipped — PG-182 in contact-automation.ts, PG-183 in account-automation.ts) with the bound createNotification from notifications.router.ts; contact_reassigned is already in NOTIFICATION_TYPES — add account_reassigned alongside it.
tasks.dod: contact.reassign + contact.bulkReassign and account.reassign + account.bulkReassign mutations; all validate caller permission; each reads the matching AutomationSetting.notifyOnOwnerChange flag and invokes the notify*Reassignment helper when true; emit contact_reassigned + account_reassigned notifications to both old and new owner; idempotent when new owner == current owner; >=90% scoped coverage

tasks.description: Module Settings - Account Tiers (/accounts/(list)/account-tiers)
tasks.dod: Account tiers at /accounts/(list)/account-tiers (tier definitions bronze/silver/gold/platinum, point thresholds, benefits matrix, default tier, upgrade/downgrade rules). MUST follow docs/planning/module-settings-playbook.md: PageHeader+bento grid; canonical EmptyState (entity + phase=passive); system-compliant CTAs; TagsTab via forwardRef; $transaction on all destructive writes; no skipDuplicates; Zod superRefine for duplicate tier names; colorToken CHECK constraint; AI defaults FALSE; wire every Boolean toggle in account-automation.ts OR declare as category-2 follow-up under IFC-310/311/312; include cross-tenant negative test; Lighthouse >=90; verified by: pnpm test

The provider-schema fix appears folded into #286 (INFRA-TF-004, whose title says "schema fix") and the module migrations in #289/#299. Likely done-but-bundled — needs owner confirmation that `terraform validate` is green.

tasks.description: CRM-to-portal delivery & billing sync (Leangency 14-day flow). On deal-won, provision the portal tenant + push initial delivery state, then mirror billing as it changes. Adds SetupInstalment model + DeliveryTier enum + tenantSlug on Opportunity; Stripe invoice create/finalize for the 3x GBP167 Setup fee (D0/7/14); StripeSubscription persistence on customer.subscription.* webhooks; a PortalDeliverySync service that POSTs /api/internal/tenants then /api/internal/delivery via the domain_events outbox; extends CloseDealWonUseCase; registers a deal_won_enriched handler in events-worker; adds a daily portal-delivery-sweep BullMQ job in ai-worker; and verifies the Stripe webhook signature (handleSubscriptionWebhook moved off tRPC).
tasks.dod: SetupInstalment + DeliveryTier + tenantSlug on Opportunity (migration applied); Stripe adapter createInvoiceItem/createInvoice/finalizeInvoice; StripeSubscription persisted on customer.subscription.*; PortalDeliverySync POSTs provision + delivery via the domain_events outbox; CloseDealWonUseCase creates 3 instalments + finalises instalment-1 + enqueues the push; events-worker handles opportunity.deal_won_enriched; ai-worker runs a daily portal-delivery-sweep job; handleSubscriptionWebhook verifies the Stripe signature; artifacts: packages/db, packages/adapters, packages/application, apps/api, apps/workers/events-worker, apps/ai-worker; targets: >=90% scoped coverage, idempotent push; verified by: pnpm typecheck/test/lint/build + pre-ship

evidence.backlog_audit_note: Shipped across #333 (CRM→portal delivery & billing sync), #367 (setup-fee invoicing), #215 (N+1 detector portion). Multiple title hits. CSV row stale.

tasks.description: Standardize attestation provenance fields (exec-attestation emits; schema declares; exec-preflight gate enforces; orchestrator DoD requires)
tasks.dod: exec-attestation always writes a provenance block (spec_session_consensus, plan_reviewer_verdict, plan_reviewer_agent, plan_reviewer_marker, spec_path, plan_path); attestation Zod+JSON schema declares those 6 fields as OPTIONAL with zero new corpus failures; new tools/scripts/exec-preflight/check-attestation-provenance.mjs BLOCKs on missing or non-affirmative provenance and is wired into the exec preflight gate list; orchestrator.md DoD requires the fields; vitest covers the gate; ADR-068 documents the decision; verified by the gate vitest test passing and validate-schemas failure count unchanged from baseline
